SELECT event_time, dateTimeToSnowflakeID(event_time) AS snowflake_id FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time, dateTimeToSnowflakeID(event_time, 1288834974657) AS snowflake_id FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > '2015-01-01 00:00:00';
CREATE TABLE event_logs (event_id UUID, event_time DateTime);
SELECT el.event_id, el.event_time, dateTimeToSnowflakeID(el.event_time) AS snowflake_id FROM event_logs el JOIN test_dates td ON el.event_time = td.event_time;
WITH (SELECT max(event_time) FROM test_dates) AS max_time SELECT dateTimeToSnowflakeID(max_time) AS max_snowflake_id;
SELECT dt, dateTimeToSnowflakeID(dt) FROM (SELECT toDateTime('2021-08-15 18:57:56', 'Asia/Shanghai') AS dt UNION ALL SELECT toDateTime('2015-02-01 10:10:10', 'UTC')) AS sub_query;
SELECT event_time, dateTimeToSnowflakeID(event_time, 0) AS snowflake_id_default, dateTimeToSnowflakeID(event_time, 1288834974657) AS snowflake_id_twitter FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE snowflake_test AS SELECT event_time, dateTimeToSnowflakeID(event_time) AS snowflake_id FROM test_dates;
SELECT snowflake_id FROM snowflake_test WHERE event_time < '2020-01-01 00:00:00';
